001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.buttons;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.BoxProvider;
004import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.button.Button;
005import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.util.TranslationUtil;
006import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.internal.lang.Displays;
007import org.bukkit.Material;
008import org.bukkit.Sound;
009import org.bukkit.SoundCategory;
010import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
011import org.bukkit.event.inventory.ClickType;
012import org.bukkit.inventory.meta.ItemMeta;
013import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
014import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
015
016public class CloseButton implements Button {
017
018    @Override
019    public @NotNull Material getIconMaterial() {
020        return Material.OAK_DOOR;
021    }
022
023    @Override
024    public int getIconAmount() {
025        return 1;
026    }
027
028    @Override
029    public @Nullable ItemMeta applyIconMeta(@NotNull Player viewer, @NotNull ItemMeta target) {
030        target.displayName(TranslationUtil.render(Displays.CLOSE_BUTTON, viewer));
031        return target;
032    }
033
034    @Override
035    public int getSlot() {
036        return 49;
037    }
038
039    @Override
040    public void onClick(@NotNull Player clicker, @NotNull ClickType clickType) {
041        BoxProvider.get().getTaskFactory().run(clicker::closeInventory);
042        clicker.playSound(clicker.getLocation(), Sound.BLOCK_CHEST_CLOSE, SoundCategory.MASTER, 100f, 1.5f);
043    }
044}
